eras.name: Early & NIT Era
eras.description: High regional variance, NIT competition, low standardization.

eras.name: Wooden Dynasty Era
eras.description: UCLA dominance, integration of college basketball, established prestige.

eras.name: Pre-Modern Transition
eras.description: Expansion of the field, end of UCLA dynasty, parity begins.

eras.name: Modern Blue Blood Era
eras.description: 64-team field, media explosion, consistent elite programs (Duke, UK, UNC).

eras.name: Portal & NIL Volatility Era
eras.description: High roster turnover, immediate eligibility, 1-and-done evolution, extreme volatility.
